summary: Comprehensive testing of HTTP Transparent Proxy Service - all backend and frontend tests passed (13/13 backend, frontend fully functional)
critical_code_review_comments: OPTIONS preflight to proxy target: When method=OPTIONS and auth is valid, request is forwarded to the target server. If target returns non-200 for OPTIONS, the proxy will forward that status. CORS is handled by middleware so client-side OPTIONS works fine regardless.
No rate limiting implemented - consider adding for production use.
The proxy forwards all headers including cookies/sensitive data from the caller to the target - this is by design but worth documenting.
context_for_next_testing_agent: All proxy endpoints working correctly. Backend tested: health, 401/403/200 auth, POST body forwarding, Authorization header forwarding, custom header forwarding, query params, PUT/DELETE methods, invalid URL 400, CORS OPTIONS. Frontend: page loads, proxy URL displays correctly, tabs switch (curl/JS/Python), copy buttons work with toast notification.
